About NACA

A focused aerospace partner for quality, compliance, safety and performance.

NACA — Nile Aerospace Compliance & Assurance was created to help aerospace organizations move beyond checklist compliance and build systems that work in real operations.

Compliance should strengthen the organization, not slow it down.

When done correctly, compliance improves quality, strengthens safety, reduces risk, and supports better operational performance.

NACA brings a practical implementation mindset to certification readiness, audits, RCCA/CAPA, SMS, risk management, training and continuous improvement.

Practical systems. Verified effectiveness. Sustainable improvement.

Mission

Help aerospace organizations achieve certification, strengthen compliance, improve safety and quality systems, and build sustainable operational excellence.

Vision

Become a trusted aerospace consulting partner recognized for integrity, technical excellence, practical implementation and measurable improvement.

Brand Promise

Experience-based support that helps organizations move beyond minimum compliance toward stronger systems, safer operations and lasting improvement.

Positioning

NACA is an aerospace quality, compliance, safety management, audit readiness and operational excellence implementation partner.

Core Solutions

Solutions built for aerospace organizations that need more than advice.

NACA supports certification readiness, audit preparation, management system improvement, RCCA/CAPA, SMS, risk-based auditing, process development, regulatory training and continuous improvement.

NACA Excellence Framework

Discover. Assess. Design. Implement. Verify. Sustain.

A disciplined improvement model designed to move clients from gaps and risk to practical implementation, verified effectiveness and sustainable improvement.

STEP 01

Discover

Understand the organization, objectives, risks, standards and compliance requirements.

STEP 02

Assess

Evaluate the current system through audits, gap assessments and evidence-based analysis.

STEP 03

Design

Develop practical solutions, processes, procedures, training and implementation plans.

STEP 04

Implement

Support the organization in applying solutions in real operations.

STEP 05

Verify

Confirm effectiveness through audits, metrics, evidence and follow-up reviews.

STEP 06

Sustain

Maintain compliance, prevent recurrence and continue improving performance.

Training & Professional Development

Regulatory training and practical capability development.

NACA supports professional development through aerospace-focused training and coaching in compliance, regulatory expectations, auditing, corrective action, SMS, risk-based thinking and continuous improvement.

Training with an implementation mindset.

Training should not only explain requirements. It should help teams apply requirements, improve processes, reduce risk and sustain performance.

Regulatory training FAA Part 145 awareness Internal auditor training Lead auditor coaching AS9100 awareness AS9110 awareness AS9120 awareness Root cause analysis RCCA & CAPA Lean fundamentals Six Sigma tools Value stream mapping Risk-based thinking Safety Management System (SMS) Process auditing Supplier quality Management review Continuous improvement
